tool_args.label: 34th Street Project Community Advisory Committee Meeting #4 Summary

payload.title: 34th Street Project Community Advisory Committee Meeting #4 Summary
payload.publisher: New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT)
payload.description: Summary of the fourth Community Advisory Committee meeting for the 34th Street Project, including presentations, roundtable discussions on block-by-block design, and question-and-answer session.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: 34th Street Project
tool_args.raw_text: 34th Street Project - improvements on 34th Street, including offset bus lanes, bus bulbs and sidewalk extensions, expanded loading zones, off-board fare collection on M16 and M34 bus routes, additional bus lane camera enforcement.

payload.description: Improvements on 34th Street corridor including offset bus lanes, bus bulbs and sidewalk extensions, expanded loading zones, off-board fare collection, and bus lane camera enforcement.

tool_args.label: Curb extensions on 34th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Curb extensions will be about 8 to 9 feet wide and about 70 to 140 feet in length.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lane 24-hour and curbside bus lane 7AM-7PM operations
tool_args.raw_text: The offset bus lanes would be in operation 24 hours and the curbside bus lane would operate 7AM to 7PM on weekdays, as is the existing condition.

payload.description: Offset bus lanes operate 24 hours, curbside bus lane operates 7AM to 7PM weekdays

tool_args.label: Proposed plan will accommodate existing traffic volume
tool_args.raw_text: DOT believes that the proposed plan will be able to accommodate the existing volume of traffic on 34th Street.

payload.claim_text: DOT believes that the proposed plan will be able to accommodate the existing volume of traffic on 34th Street.
payload.subject: 34th Street proposed plan

tool_args.label: Bus lane rules remain the same
tool_args.raw_text: Yes, bus lane rules will remain the same.

payload.claim_text: Bus lane rules will remain the same under the new design, allowing expeditious pick-up/drop-offs in the bus lane.

tool_args.label: Taxis can pick-up/drop-off in curbside bus lane
tool_args.raw_text: Expeditious pick-up and drop-up of passengers would be legal from the curbside bus lane, as is the case today.

payload.claim_text: Expeditious pick-up and drop-off of passengers would be legal from the curbside bus lane, as is the case today.

tool_args.label: Median busway design infeasible due to street width
tool_args.raw_text: The limited width of 34th Street makes a median busway design infeasible. There would not be adequate space on either side the busway to allow for the safe passage of vehicles and loading activity at the curb.

payload.claim_text: The limited width of 34th Street makes a median busway design infeasible. There would not be adequate space on either side the busway to allow for the safe passage of vehicles and loading activity at the curb.

tool_args.label: Access to all parking garages and active curb cuts maintained
tool_args.raw_text: Under the proposed plan, access to all parking garages and active curb cuts will be maintained.

payload.claim_text: Under the proposed plan, access to all parking garages and active curb cuts will be maintained.

tool_args.label: SBS bus frequency every 5 minutes
tool_args.raw_text: Buses would be scheduled to operate approximately every five minutes, or as needed to meet demand.

payload.claim_text: Buses would be scheduled to operate approximately every five minutes, or as needed to meet demand.

tool_args.label: Curb extension width 8-9 feet
tool_args.raw_text: Curb extensions will be about 8 to 9 feet wide and about 70 to 140 feet in length.
